production_approval.reason: Canary-only NVDA expansion from runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260702T083957.824535000Z-p81952-s0. This keeps the live scope debit-spread-only and preserves the safer 45000 capital denominator, 2% max symbol allocation, max 1 open position, and max 1 position per symbol, so per-symbol/open debit exposure remains capped near 900. The full-history run used 2010-01-01 through 2026-06-30, 100000 research gate denominator, cache-only snapshot-backed data, and produced 708 allocated trades, 106314.50 raw PnL, 88614.50 $25-cost PnL, 55.2% win rate, 3.80 profit factor, 67.54 trades/year, 3.44% account-budget capital DD, and 4.24% $25-cost account-budget capital DD. Recent-regime validation passed with 210 trailing trades and 45659.50 $25-cost PnL. MDB remained valid with 10 trades and 806.00 $25-cost PnL. NVDA passed the new-symbol check with 115 trades and 5662.00 $25-cost PnL. Source canary status remains canary_only rather than full_promotion_candidate because $25-cost PnL did not beat the superseded 104178.00 baseline; this approval is a safer canary-ready expansion that improves the prior canary-only envelope by 18473.00 after $25/trade costs without loosening live heat.
